CREATE TABLE test_charset (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_charset (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test A');
INSERT INTO test_charset (id, name) VALUES (2, 'Test B');
SELECT name FROM test_charset WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_charset);
SELECT current_charset() AS charset_name, COUNT(*) FROM test_charset GROUP BY charset_name;
SELECT * FROM test_charset WHERE name IN (SELECT name FROM test_charset WHERE id < 3);
SELECT current_charset() AS charset_name FROM dual UNION SELECT current_charset();
CREATE TABLE another_charset (id INT, charset_name VARCHAR(100), PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO another_charset SELECT id, current_charset() FROM test_charset;
SELECT a.id, a.charset_name FROM another_charset a JOIN test_charset b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.name LIKE '%Test%';
SELECT current_charset() AS current_encoding FROM test_charset HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT current_charset(), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_charset) AS total FROM DUAL;
